name: HMS Reboundo (FY 602)
events: 5 Feb 1945 HMS Untiring (Lt. G.E.L.F. Edsell, RN) departed Plymouth for Sheerness. She was escorted by HMS Reboundo (Skr. S.F. Cleveland, RNR). (1)

20 Feb 1945 Around 1050 A/20, HMS Truant (Lt.Cdr. R.S. Brookes, DSO, DSC, RN) departed the Solent for Portland where she arrived around 1845 A/20. She was escorted by HMS Reboundo (Skr. S.F. Cleveland, RNR). (2)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
